name: Bartow County Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Bartow County Recreation Center in Cartersville, GA! There are 9 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Carter Grove Clubhouse Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Carter Grove Clubhouse Courts in Cartersville, GA! There are 2 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Cartersville Country Club
description: Cartersville Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Cartersville, GA. There are 2 outdoor clay and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights and restrooms.

name: Dellinger Park
description: Dellinger Park is a place to play pickleball in Cartersville, GA. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights, water, restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and trainers or lessons. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Hamilton Crossing Park
description: Come play pickleball at Hamilton Crossing Park in Cartersville, GA! There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts.

name: Houston Suggs Youth Facility
description: Houston Suggs Youth Facility is a place to play pickleball in Cartersville, GA. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Joe Cowan Park
description: Come play pickleball at Joe Cowan Park in Euharlee, GA! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Lakepoint Champions Center
description: Come play pickleball at Lakepoint Champions Center in Emerson, GA! You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are private.

name: LakePoint Sports
description: LakePoint Sports is a place to play pickleball in Cartersville, GA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.

name: Manning Mill Park
description: While there are 3 tennis courts only only 1 is lined for pickleball.

name: Old Cass High School
description: Come play pickleball at Old Cass High School in Cartersville, GA! There are 3 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Players have access to lights.
